; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-06-21T00:00:00Z
;
; Empty-page fix (Alessio Faraci, 2026-06-21)
; ------------------------------------------
; ISSUE: the original detected annotations by .rm file existance. But deleting all strokes from a page does
; not remove the .rm file.
; FIX: read the .rm as an ArrayBuffer and walk its block list, marking a page annotated
; only if it holds >=1 LIVE (value-carrying) line/glyph/text scene item, or typed text (RootText).
; SAFE DEFAULT: on any uncertainty (null/short buffer, non-v6 header, truncated/odd block, unexpected
; item layout) it returns annotated.
;
; Live current-page fix (Alessio Faraci, 2026-06-21)
; -------------------------------------------------
; ISSUE: The .rm disk scan reads a snapshot, but xochitl flushes a page's strokes to disk only when
; navigating away from it (or after an on-canvas autosave debounce), not when the Overview opens.
; When drawing on (or erase) the current page and open the Overview without first leaving the page,
; that page's .rm is stale and the filter was wrong until you returned to the canvas and reopened.
; FIX: the only page that can be stale is the current one, so the model .filter() resolves the current
; page from the live scene via documentView.hasEmptyScene() and uses the disk-walk cache for every other page
; The filter re-runs on Overview open and on each "Annotated" tap, so the current page is correct immediately
; with no navigation.
;
; Verified against the entire on-device .rm corpus (xochitl 3.27.2.2, 51 files / 22 docs).


AFFECT [[13984630014232179591]]
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property ~&6503679477&~ filterAnnotated: ~&214625660372&~
            property ~&197102514&~ annotatedPages: ({})

            readonly property ~&7083178290016&~ _rmBasePath: "file:///home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/"

            function _scanAnnotatedPages() {
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&7712934851008712&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
                ~&214622607920&~ ~&214623780460&~ = ~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~;
                ~&214622607920&~ ~&7083121414760&~ = {};
                ~&197091758&~ ~&233740417207246&~ = ~&7712934851008712&~.~&254543134818768527&~;
                ~&197085552&~ (~&197091758&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&7712934851008712&~.~&254543134818768527&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                    (function(~&254543134825829310&~) {
                        ~&214622607920&~ ~&7083037950451&~ = ~&7712934851008712&~.~&254533375641282938&~(~&254543134825829310&~);
                        ~&214622607920&~ req =   new   XMLHttpRequest();
                        req.~&6504147419&~("GET", ~&6504254477&~._rmBasePath + ~&214623780460&~ + ~&"180920&~ + ~&7083037950451&~ + ".rm");
                        req.responseType = "arraybuffer";
                        req.onreadystatechange = function() {
                            ~&5972376&~ (req.readyState === XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
                                ~&5972376&~ (req.~&7083177691309&~ === 200 || (req.~&7713519214849208&~ && req.~&7713519214849208&~.byteLength > 0)) {
                                    ~&7083121414760&~[~&254543134825829310&~] = ~&6504254477&~._rmHasContent(req.~&7713519214849208&~);
                                }
                                ~&233740417207246&~--;
                                ~&5972376&~ (~&233740417207246&~ === 0) {
                                    ~&6504254477&~.annotatedPages = ~&7083121414760&~;
                                }
                            }
                        };
                        req.~&6504279475&~();
                    })(~&180978&~);
                }
            }

            function _rmVaruint(dv, ~&180985&~, end) {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&7083121414760&~ = 0, ~&214641325223&~ = 0, ~&180971&~;
                ~&5972220&~ {
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&180985&~ >= end) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504117156&~;
                    ~&180971&~ = dv.getUint8(~&180985&~); ~&180985&~ += 1;
                    ~&7083121414760&~ += (~&180971&~ & 0x7~&180943&~) * ~&6502909715&~.~&197096447&~(2, ~&214641325223&~);
                    ~&214641325223&~ += 7;
                } ~&214646069090&~ (~&180971&~ & 0x80);
                ~&7083121450889&~ { ~&180991&~: ~&7083121414760&~, ~&180985&~: ~&180985&~ };
            }

            function _rmItemState(dv, ~&214641748151&~, end) {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&180985&~ = ~&214641748151&~, ~&197088462&~, tt, ~&197100325&~, pv;
                ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ want = 1; want <= 4; want++) {
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&180985&~ >= end) ~&7083121450889&~ 2;
                    ~&197100325&~ = _rmVaruint(dv, ~&180985&~, end); ~&5972376&~ (!~&197100325&~) ~&7083121450889&~ 2; ~&180985&~ = ~&197100325&~.~&180985&~;
                    ~&197088462&~ = ~&197100325&~.~&180991&~ >>> 4; tt = ~&197100325&~.~&180991&~ & 0x~&180943&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&197088462&~ !== want || tt !== 0x~&180943&~) ~&7083121450889&~ 2;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&180985&~ >= end) ~&7083121450889&~ 2;
                    ~&180985&~ += 1;
                    pv = _rmVaruint(dv, ~&180985&~, end); ~&5972376&~ (!pv) ~&7083121450889&~ 2; ~&180985&~ = pv.~&180985&~;
                }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180985&~ >= end) ~&7083121450889&~ 0;
                ~&197100325&~ = _rmVaruint(dv, ~&180985&~, end); ~&5972376&~ (!~&197100325&~) ~&7083121450889&~ 2; ~&180985&~ = ~&197100325&~.~&180985&~;
                ~&197088462&~ = ~&197100325&~.~&180991&~ >>> 4; tt = ~&197100325&~.~&180991&~ & 0x~&180943&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (~&197088462&~ === 5 && tt === 0x4) {
                    ~&180985&~ += 4;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&180985&~ >= end) ~&7083121450889&~ 0;
                    ~&197100325&~ = _rmVaruint(dv, ~&180985&~, end); ~&5972376&~ (!~&197100325&~) ~&7083121450889&~ 2; ~&180985&~ = ~&197100325&~.~&180985&~;
                    ~&197088462&~ = ~&197100325&~.~&180991&~ >>> 4; tt = ~&197100325&~.~&180991&~ & 0x~&180943&~;
                }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&197088462&~ === 6 && tt === 0x~&180940&~) ~&7083121450889&~ 1;
                ~&7083121450889&~ 0;
            }

            function _rmHasContent(buf) {
                ~&5972376&~ (!buf || buf.byteLength < 43) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504329801&~;
                ~&197102514&~ dv =  new  DataView(buf);
                ~&197102514&~ n = buf.byteLength;
                ~&197102514&~ HDR = "reMarkable .lines file, version=6";
                ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180977&~ = 0; ~&180977&~ < HDR.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180977&~++) {
                    ~&5972376&~ (dv.getUint8(~&180977&~) !== HDR.charCodeAt(~&180977&~)) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504329801&~;
                }
                ~&197102514&~ ~&180985&~ = 43;
                ~&214646069090&~ (~&180985&~ + 8 <= n) {
                    ~&197102514&~ len = dv.getUint32(~&180985&~, ~&6504329801&~);
                    ~&197102514&~ btype = dv.getUint8(~&180985&~ + 7);
                    ~&197102514&~ payloadStart = ~&180985&~ + 8;
                    ~&197102514&~ payloadEnd = payloadStart + len;
                    ~&5972376&~ (payloadEnd > n) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504329801&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (btype === 0x03 || btype === 0x05 || btype === 0x06) {
                        ~&5972376&~ (_rmItemState(dv, payloadStart, payloadEnd) !== 0) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504329801&~;
                    } ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (btype === 0x07) {
                        ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504329801&~;
                    }
                    ~&180985&~ = payloadEnd;
                }
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;
            }

            ~&13184053911240945935&~: {
                annotatedPages = ({});
                filterAnnotated = ~&214625660372&~;
            }
        }

        REBUILD [[13733777459642361598]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&15212200997754082097&~.~&6503888195&~(); }
            INSERT {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&233748328658231&~ && ~&7712934851008712&~) {
                    _scanAnnotatedPages();
                }
            }
        END REBUILD

        REBUILD [[214634455770]]
            LOCATE AFTER ALL
            INSERT {
                .~&7082656280847&~(function(~&180978&~) {
                    ~&7083121450889&~ !~&6504254477&~.filterAnnotated
                        || ((~&180978&~ === ~&6504254477&~.~&477346483278306569&~
                                && ~&6504254477&~.~&15793094956877902211&~
                                && ~&7083223278816&~ ~&6504254477&~.~&15793094956877902211&~.~&10649546070979613506&~ === ~&"7713028246101167&~)
                            ? !~&6504254477&~.~&15793094956877902211&~.~&10649546070979613506&~()
                            : !!~&6504254477&~.annotatedPages[~&180978&~]);
                })
            }
        END REBUILD

        TRAVERSE [[254501108490678590]]#[[3012200093845240877]]
            LOCATE AFTER [[8398116566483627918]]#[[12788589299978607238]]
            INSERT {
                ~&8398116566483627918&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: filterAnnotatedButton
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~: ~&12788589299978607238&~.~&214640173127&~
                    ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                        ~&6504254477&~.filterAnnotated = !~&6504254477&~.filterAnnotated;
                    }
                    ~&233748328658231&~: !~&6504254477&~.~&254547531013851079&~ && !!~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&7713012671454059&~ !== ~&7711571060833448&~.~&7711997891205770&~
                    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"15094524446771932550&~
                    ~&214642559243&~: ~&6504222003&~("Annotated")
                    ~&7713748390489352&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&7081723389952&~
                    ~&7713147376549066&~: ~&6504254477&~.filterAnnotated
                    ~&8399273526924993769&~.~&214622605608&~: ~&6504254477&~.filterAnnotated ? ~&10508057930134225032&~ : ~&"503220030291830651&~
                    ~&214646099849&~: ~&12921149980962105220&~ + ~&233740248806464&~
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&8399743405844438450&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&13257341367876254&~
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
